wakame-cucumber-salad.name: Wakame-cucumber Salad

ingredients.item: 0.5 english hothouse cucumber or 2 kirby cucumbers

instructions: Soak wakame in a small bowl of cold water 20 minutes. Drain and squeeze wakame gently to remove excess water. Cut into 1–2” pieces.
Meanwhile, bring vinegar, sugar, salt, peppercorns, and 2 cups water to a boil in a medium saucepan, whisking to dissolve sugar and salt. Let cool.
Combine wakame, cucumber, daikon, and pickling liquid in a medium bowl. Cover and chill at least 24 hours. Drain excess liquid just before serving.
DO AHEAD: Salad can be made 3 days ahead; keep chilled.

wallaby-darned.name: Wallaby-darned
instructions: Place the vodka, schnapps, sugar, champagne, peaches, fuzzy navel mix, and ice into a blender. Blend until smooth and serve.

warm-brussels-sprout-slaw-with-mustard-s.name: Warm Brussels Sprout Slaw With Mustard Seeds And Walnuts
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add mustard seeds and cook, stirring frequently, until seeds begin to pop. Add shallots and 1/4 tsp. salt and toss to coat. Lower heat to medium and cook, stirring frequently, until lightly browned, 4 minutes. Add shredded Brussels sprouts and 1/2 tsp. salt and toss to coat. Pour in 1/3 cup water, reduce heat to medium, and cook until sprouts are crisp-tender, about 4 minutes. Stir in lemon juice and toss to coat. Season with more salt, if desired. Toss in walnuts and serve.

watermelon-and-feta-with-lime-and-serran.name: Watermelon And Feta With Lime And Serrano Chili Peppers
instructions: Place the watermelon in a large mixing bowl. Add the minced serrano chili pepper and lime juice to the bowl and toss gently until combined. Sprinkle with the feta and cilantro leaves and toss once more to incorporate. Refrigerate until ready to serve.

weeknight-chicken-cacciatore.name: Weeknight Chicken Cacciatore

ingredients.item: Roasted red pepper and garlic tomato sauce

instructions: Dip chicken pieces in flour and shake off excess.

Heat oil in a 10-inch skillet over medium-high heat. Add chicken and brown well, 4 to 5 minutes per side. Remove chicken from the pan and set aside. Drain most of the oil from the skillet, leaving about 1/8 inch.

Add bell pepper, onion, garlic, oregano, pepper flakes, salt, and pepper to the skillet. Sauté, stirring constantly, for 2 minutes. Pour in spaghetti sauce and add enough water to thin mixture just a little; sauce will thicken as it cooks. Stir well and add chicken to the sauce. Spoon sauce over chicken to coat and bring to a simmer.
Cover, lower heat, and cook, turning chicken and scraping the bottom of the pan often, until chicken is no longer pink at the bone and the juices run clear, about 40 minutes.

western-omelet-quiche.name: Western Omelet Quiche
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Place pie crust in a 9-inch glass pie plate. Set aside.
Cook and stir ham in a large skillet over medium heat until it no longer looks moist, about 3 minutes. Remove from heat and cool to room temperature.
Mix together cheese, milk, eggs, bell pepper, onion, garlic, black pepper, sugar, and salt in a large bowl until well combined. Stir in ham. Pour into the prepared pie plate.
Bake in the preheated oven until crust is golden, the top is lightly browned, and filling is set, about 1 hour.

wet-walnuts.name: Wet Walnuts
instructions: Combine walnut halves and pure maple syrup in a 1-quart container.
Cover the container and let the mixture sit at room temperature for 1 hour. Alternatively, cover and chill in the refrigerator for up to 1 month.
If chilled, bring the wet walnuts to room temperature before serving.

whiskey-daisy.name: Whiskey Daisy
instructions: Add 2 oz. whiskey, ¾ oz. fresh lemon juice, ½ oz. orange liqueur, and ¼ oz. simple syrup (1:1) to a cocktail shaker and fill with ice. Seal and shake vigorously for 15 seconds. Strain with a Hawthorne strainer into a rocks glass filled with fresh ice and add a splash of club soda, if using. Garnish with an orange slice and maraschino cherry.

white-chocolate-and-raspberry-cake-lezze.name: White Chocolate And Raspberry Cake
instructions: 1. Beat the egg with a large bowl of vanilla and sugar.
2. Add oil and milk.
3. Flour, cocoa, stir by adding baking powder and release dough to oil paper-series tray.
4. Cook for 20-25 minutes in the oven set to 160 degrees.
5. Mix the egg yolk, milk, sugar, vanilla and flour in the pot and cook until the middle fire is darkened.
6. Continue mixing up to add white chocolate and cheer.
7. Add the cheese and cream to the lab and add it to the mixer.
8.  Keki ortadan ikiye kesin.
9. Spread and close the 2/3 of the cream on it.
10. Plaster on the remaining cream.
11. 11. Do lines on chocolate sauce.
12. Serve by decorating overni mint leaves.

white-chocolate-tart-lezzet.name: White Chocolate Tart
instructions: 1. Mix flour, butter, sugar, vanilla and salt into the kitchen robot and until bread crumbs.
2. Add and mix egg yolks.
3. Place the dough into lubricated weighing molds and cool in refrigerator for 15 minutes.
4. Set the oven to 180 degrees and place the molds and cook until it is light.
5. Remove from the oven and leave it cool.
6. Add chocolates divided into small pieces and stir until they are melted.
7. Share the mixture to the tart base and wait in the refrigerator until chocolate frost.
8. Serve by decorating Truf.
9. You can find the classic chocolate tart recipe prepared with densely flavored dark parts here.

white-sangria.name: White Sangria
instructions: Combine first 5 ingredients in a large pitcher. Mash fruits gently with the back of a wooden spoon to release their juices. Add wine and stir to combine. Cover and refrigerate for at least 8 hours and up to 48 hours (the longer it sits, the fruitier it will be). Divide among ice-filled wineglasses.

white-shrimp-feijoada-with-sausage-telec.name: White Shrimp Feijoada With Sausage
white-shrimp-feijoada-with-sausage-telec.original_name: Feijoada branca de camarão com linguiça
instructions: Peel the onions, cut them in half-moons and praise them in a pot with the olive oil. Add the sausage, cut into slices, cook some more and then add the shrimp kernel. Water with port wine and stir.
Add the beans drained and let cook, in mild heat. If necessary, add some water. Almost at the end, season with salt and pepper, add the chopped parsley and let it be clear. Serve right away.

whole-tomatoes-in-jars-canning-steriliza.name: Whole Tomatoes In Jars / Canning & Sterilization
whole-tomatoes-in-jars-canning-steriliza.original_name: Oλόκληρες ντομάτες σε βάζα / Κονσερβοποίηση & Aποστείρωση
instructions: Wash the jars with hot water and soap.
Either bottle them for 15 minutes on medium heat, or turn on the evening at 1503
Allow them to stay in the oven for 15 minutes. We make them carefully, because they're too hot and we let them cool.

whole-wheat-banana-oat-muffins.name: Whole Wheat Banana Oat Muffins
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Line a muffin tin with paper liners.
Combine oats, whole wheat flour, all-purpose flour, white sugar, baking powder, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and nutmeg in a medium-sized bowl; set aside.
Lightly beat eggs in a large bowl. Stir in milk, oil, brown sugar, and vanilla extract. Add bananas and mix together well.
Add 1/2 of the flour mixture to egg mixture; stir to combine. Add remaining flour mixture and stir. Stir nuts into batter.
Spoon batter into the prepared muffin cups, filling each 3/4 full.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted in the center of a muffin comes out clean, 18 to 20 minutes.

whole-wheat-pasta-in-the-oven-argiro.name: Whole Wheat Pasta In The Oven

ingredients.item: 2 peppers green and red in slices
Some fresh thyme and fresh oregano
2 peppers green and red in slices
Some fresh thyme and fresh oregano

instructions: We need homemade tomato sauce.
Preheat the oven first to 180oC.
We're oiling a fireproof vessel.
Boil the pasta whole in salted water, drain and put it back in the pot.
Add half of the tomato sauce and mix.
Heat the oil in a pan and sauté the onion, peppers, garlic and mushrooms.
Add the sausages finely chopped and herbs and add salt and pepper.
Add half the pasta to the baking pan and empty the filling.
Cover with the rest of the pasta.
We make a layer of pumpkins in very thin slices and carrot.
Rub the cheeses and coat them on the surface of our food.
Pour the rest of the tomato sauce over our food.
Bake for 20 minutes with the baking pan covered.
Uncover and continue baking for another 10 minutes until golden.
Serve them warm with season salad and have a delightful meal quickly and economically!

whole-wheat-pasta-recipe-with-mushrooms-.name: Whole Wheat Pasta Recipe With Mushrooms And Vegetables
whole-wheat-pasta-recipe-with-mushrooms-.original_name: Receta de pasta integral con hongos y verduras

ingredients.item: 160 g de pasta integral (fusilli o similar)
2  cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra
Hojas de albahaca fresca para servir

instructions: Put plenty of water with salt to boil. Cooking the whole dough as instructed by the package until it's to the dente. Listen to her and get some cooking water.

Meanwhile, wash and cut all the vegetables: the mushrooms in sheets, the pumpkin in thin moons, the carrot in cuts, the pepper in medium pieces, the green beans in about 3 cm segments and the onion in thin strips.
Warm olive oil in a large frying pan with medium heat. Add the chopped garlic and onion. Fry for 2 minutes till they soften.
It first incorporates carrot and green beans, and they take longer to cook. Jumps 4-5 minutes, sometimes stirring.
Then add the mushrooms, pumpkin and red pepper. Cooking with about 6-7 more minutes, till the vegetables are tender but with some firmness. Dig to taste and add a pint of dried herbs.
It incorporates baked pasta into frying pan. If very dry, add one or two tablespoons of reserved cooking water. Mix well to integrate flavors.
Sirve caliente, con hojas de albahaca fresca por encima y un chorrito de aceite de oliva en crudo si lo deseas.

whole-wheat-pizza-lezzet.name: Whole Wheat Pizza
instructions: 1. Melt yeast in warm water.
2. Extract the dandruff flour into the dough kneading container.
3. Open the midst pool and add the egg.
4.   Add yeast water and liquid, and relax for 30 minutes.
5. Open the dough on a ground with flour.
6. Place the oiled rectangle oven tray.
7. Cook in oven for 5 minutes and remove from the oven.
8. Add half of the cheese, chopped chopped chopped peppers and olives.
9. Spread the cheese remaining 5 minutes from the oven to the oven.
10. Serve slice and hot.

2. Carrot add potatoes and whales and sauce 2–3 minutes.
3. Add red lentils, add water or chicken/sebze water.
4. Add salt and spices.
5. Cook for 25–30 minutes until the vegetables are softened.
